_description: SYNTHETIC Western-EU supermarket receipt (fictional French 'MARCHÉ DU SUD'), VAT-INCLUSIVE (TTC), comma decimals, two TVA rates (5,5% food / 20% non-food) plus a loyalty REMISE. Traps: the printed TVA total (2,31) is INCLUDED so tax=0; REMISE FIDÉLITÉ is a discount (1,49), not a product; the line prices are the printed TTC (sum 21,49) while the paid TOTAL is 20,00. Replace with a real Carrefour/Tesco/Albert Heijn receipt later.
_taxNote: VAT-inclusive: tax not asserted (model may report the contained VAT; app adds nothing on top). See HaikuReceiptExtractor.isTaxOnTop.
